selected_issues.title: [billwatch] EIA API v2 integration — residential electricity rate data for benchmarking and state pages
selected_issues.reason: P1 REVENUE ENABLER. BillWatch's 50-state SEO pages (#333) just shipped. Adding real EIA rate data makes them authoritative and enables benchmarking ('your rate is 23% above state average'). Free API, well-scoped integration (typed client + API route + caching). Revenue path: real data → benchmarking → 'you're overpaying' → energy switching affiliate CTAs. This is the next logical step on BillWatch's revenue funnel — without real data, the state pages are informational only.

selected_issues.title: [afterloss] County-level programmatic SEO pages — 3,200+ county probate court guides
selected_issues.reason: P2 SEO EXPANSION. Unblocked since #258 (state probate pages) completed. 3,200+ county pages = massive long-tail SEO surface area targeting queries like 'probate court [county] [state]'. Phase 1 scopes to top 200 counties by population (~50% of US population). Programmatic content generation is ideal for autonomous workers — templated pages with county-specific data. Can embed Nolo affiliate links directly in county guides. Complements existing state-level pages for comprehensive geographic SEO coverage.

selected_issues.title: [afterloss] Curate subscription cancellation templates (100+ services)
selected_issues.reason: P2 REVENUE UNLOCKER. Unblocked since #111 (DB schema) completed. Curating 100+ service cancellation templates is content work well-suited for autonomous workers. CRITICAL: this directly unblocks #293 (cancellation SEO pages, P1), which creates /cancel/{service} pages targeting high-intent searches like 'how to cancel [service] after death'. Each cancellation page can embed affiliate links for identity protection and legal services. Content creation task = high completion probability for autonomous workers.

housekeeping.reason: ORCHESTRATE CYCLE 34 (2026-03-19 13:15 UTC): SUCCESSFUL CYCLE + FRESH PICKS. MAJOR PROGRESS: Both #333 (billwatch 50-state SEO) and #292 (afterloss phone scripts) COMPLETED after 3 cycles — the completion warnings from cycle 33 were unnecessary, workers delivered. #336 (billwatch crisis SEO) also completed. 3 issues closed this cycle = best productivity yet. NEW PICKS: #331 (billwatch EIA API) is the next logical step for BillWatch — real rate data powers benchmarking on the newly-shipped 50-state pages. #266 (county SEO) returns as a fresh pick with high completion probability. #256 (cancellation templates) is a content task that unblocks the P1 cancellation SEO pages (#293). Revenue thesis: #331 adds data authority to BillWatch state pages → conversion. #266 expands AfterLoss SEO surface area 10x. #256 → #293 pipeline creates high-intent cancellation SEO pages with affiliate embedding.
